title: More Backpack Upgrades
description: More Backpack Upgrades is an addon for Sophisticated Backpacks that bridges the gap between your portable storage and your Refined Storage network.
body:
More Backpack Upgrades (更多背包升级)

More Backpack Upgrades is an addon for Sophisticated Backpacks that bridges the gap between your portable storage and your Refined Storage network.

Forget about manually emptying your backpack after a mining trip. With these new upgrades, your items are teleported directly into your digital storage system, no matter where you are or across dimensions!

更多背包升级 是 Sophisticated Backpacks (精妙背包) 的附属模组，它架起了你的便携背包与 Refined Storage (精致存储) 网络之间的桥梁。

忘掉每次挖矿归来都要手动清空背包的繁琐吧。有了这些全新的升级卡，无论你身处何地或跨越维度，物品都能直接传送进你的数字存储系统中！

✨ Features (功能特性)
This mod adds three powerful "Dimensional" upgrades. To link an upgrade to your network, simply Shift + Right-Click on a Refined Storage Controller with the upgrade item in hand.

本模组添加了三种强大的“次元”升级卡。要将升级卡绑定到你的网络，只需手持升级卡对着 Refined Storage 的 控制器 (Controller) 按 Shift + 右键 即可。

🧲 Dimensional Magnet Upgrade (次元磁吸升级)
Function: Pulls items from the ground directly into your linked RS system.
Smart Fallback: If your RS system is full or offline, items will safely go into your backpack instead.
Configurable: Customizable range and filter settings (inherits from Sophisticated Core).
功能： 将地面上的掉落物直接吸入绑定的 RS 系统中。
智能回退： 如果 RS 系统已满或离线，物品会自动进入背包，防止丢失。
可配置： 支持自定义吸附范围和过滤器设置（继承自 Sophisticated Core）。
📥 Dimensional Pickup Upgrade (次元拾取升级)
Function: Items you pick up normally (by walking over them) are instantly sent to your linked RS system.
Security: Correctly marks items as "inserted by player" for RS security audits.
功能： 你正常拾取（走过）的物品会瞬间发送到绑定的 RS 系统中。
安全： 正确标记物品为“玩家插入”，适配 RS 的安全审计系统。
🚚 Dimensional Deposit Upgrade (次元卸货升级)
Function: Allows you to dump your backpack's contents into an RS network remotely.
Usage: Shift + Right-Click a container or an RS Controller/Network component to deposit items matching your filters.
Wireless: Works across dimensions if the chunk containing your RS Controller is loaded.
功能： 允许你将背包内的物品远程倾倒进 RS 网络。
用法： 对着容器或 RS 控制器/网络组件 Shift + 右键，即可根据过滤器设置卸货。
无线： 只要 RS 控制器所在的区块已加载，支持跨维度工作。
🛠️ Requirements (前置需求)
To use this mod, you need the following installed:
要使用此模组，你需要安装以下内容：

Minecraft 1.20.1
Forge (47.4.0+)
Sophisticated Backpacks
Sophisticated Core
Refined Storage
📝 Configuration (配置)
You can configure the range of the Dimensional Magnet Upgrade in the config file:
你可以在配置文件中调整次元磁吸升级的范围：
config/MoreBackpackUpgrades-common.toml

🤝 Credits & License
Author: 空枝霁雨 (KongZhiJiYu)
License: LGPL-2.1
This mod uses code adapted from Sophisticated Backpacks API to ensure seamless integration.
